title: What recommended size for Custom Logo Stickers?
excerpt: As a brand manager, I recommend a size of 3x3 inches for custom logo stickers. This size provides enough space for clear and detailed branding while being versatile for various applications. Any suggestions or experience…

posts.author: Mariosmith99 (Mario)
posts.cookedHtml: As a brand manager, I recommend a size of 3x3 inches for custom logo stickers. This size provides enough space for clear and detailed branding while being versatile for various applications. Any suggestions or experiences with different sizes?
